steps.title: Solve the system by elimination
steps.content: Multiply the first by 2: $2x+8y=38$. Subtract $2x+y=4$: $7y=34$, so $y=\tfrac{34}{7}$. Then $x=19-4y=19-\tfrac{136}{7}=-\tfrac{3}{7}$.

steps.title: Find the value $3x + 5y$
steps.content: Add the two equations: $3x+5y=19+4=23$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
